rationale: Acting on Review 1 forces addition of an unrequested public lemma (aut_apply_root) plus simp/scope changes, enlarging API surface for a PR whose module docstring explicitly scopes itself to only the two stated Layer-0 results; acting on Review 2 leaves the focused, sufficient minimal API exactly as written in the diff. Neither review surfaces a material api-design flaw that a maintainer would require fixing in this PR.
